Found in setup_task.sh. This is a synthetic base32 string that decodes to 'test1234567897985967294567897985'.
The task description strictly requires the bookmark to be named exactly 'SecureDrop Portal'.

The task description requires setting the security level to 'Safest'. In Tor Browser, 'Safest' maps to the 'browser.security_level.security_slider' value of 1. A value of 4 corresponds to the default 'Standard' level, contradicting the instruction.

privileged_info_summary: The required Tor connection credentials (onion address and private key) are synthetically generated and explicitly provided in the setup_task.sh script. The expected bookmark title 'SecureDrop Portal' matches the task description. The expected_security_slider metadata value of 4 is contradicted by the task instruction to set the security level to 'Safest', as Tor Browser's 'Safest' mode maps to a preference value of 1, whereas 4 represents the default 'Standard' level.
